Comment.MultiLanguageText: P117-T7ABC - Selectie Pupitru Local pt. T7A, T7B, T7C
P118-T7ABC - Selectie Pupitru Cabina pt. T7A, T7B, T7C
P194-Apa - Pompa 5 (pompa turnuri racire) - Cmd. Start
P195-Apa - Pompa 5 (pompa turnuri racire) - Cmd. Stop
P204-Apa - Pompa 10 (pompa evacuare canal) - Cmd. Start
P205-Apa - Pompa 10 (pompa evacuare canal) - Cmd. Stop
P206-Apa - Pompa 11 (pompa evacuare avarie) - Cmd. Start
P207-Apa - Pompa 11 (pompa evacuare avarie) - Cmd. Stop
P210-Apa - Transportator Elicoidal TE1 - Cmd. Start
P211-Apa - Transportator Elicoidal TE1 - Cmd. Stop
P212-Apa - Transportator Elicoidal TE2 - Cmd. Start
P213-Apa - Transportator Elicoidal TE2 - Cmd. Stop
P217-Apa - Ventilator Turn Racire 1 - Cmd. Stop
P219-Apa - Ventilator Turn Racire 2 - Cmd. Stop
P220 - Apa - Pompa 1 (pompa principala) - Btn + (Incrementare Setpoint)
P220 - Apa - Pompa 1 (pompa principala) - Btn - (Decrementare Setpoint)
P228-Apa - Ventilator Turn Racire 1 - Cmd. Start Turatie Mica
P229-Apa - Ventilator Turn Racire 1 - Cmd. Start Turatie Mare
P230-Apa - Ventilator Turn Racire 2 - Cmd. Start Turatie Mica
P231-Apa - Ventilator Turn Racire 2 - Cmd. Start Turatie Mare
P235-Apa - Y1 - Comanda ON/OFF in Mod Operare Manual
P236-Apa - Y2 - Comanda ON/OFF in Mod Operare Manual
P237-Apa - Y3 - Comanda ON/OFF in Mod Operare Manual
P256-Apa - Ciclu Automat Deztunderizator - Cmd. Start
P328-T7AB - Masina Marcare - Cmd. Start Marcare
P343-Apa - Pompa 5 (pompa turnuri racire) - Cmd. Start (local)
P344-Apa - Pompa 5 (pompa turnuri racire) - Cmd. Stop (local)
P345-Apa - Pompa 6 (pompa schimbator caldura) - Cmd. Start (local)
P346-Apa - Pompa 6 (pompa schimbator caldura) - Cmd. Stop (local)
P353-Apa - Pompa 10 (pompa evacuare canal) - Cmd. Start (local)
P354-Apa - Pompa 10 (pompa evacuare canal) - Cmd. Stop (local)
P355-Apa - Pompa 11 (pompa evacuare avarie) - Cmd. Start (local)
P356-Apa - Pompa 11 (pompa evacuare avarie) - Cmd. Stop (local)
Buton oprire aer racire senzori T4
P359-Apa - Transportator Elicoidal TE1 - Cmd. Start (local)
P360-Apa - Transportator Elicoidal TE2 - Cmd. Stop (local)
P361-Apa - Transportator Elicoidal TE2 - Cmd. Start (local)
P362-Apa - Transportator Elicoidal TE2 - Cmd. Stop (local)
P363-T7C-Masina Debitare: Masina Debitare Comanda Activare/Dezactivare
P366-Apa - Ventilator Turn Racire 1 - Cmd. Stop (local)
P368-Apa - Ventilator Turn Racire 2 - Cmd. Stop (local)
P377-Apa - Ventilator Turn Racire 1 - Cmd. Start Turatie Mica (local)
P378-Apa - Ventilator Turn Racire 1 - Cmd. Start Turatie Mare (local)
P379-Apa - Ventilator Turn Racire 2 - Cmd. Start Turatie Mica (local)
P380-Apa - Ventilator Turn Racire 2 - Cmd. Start Turatie Mare (local)
P382-Apa - Y1 - Comanda ON/OFF in Mod Operare Manual
P383-Apa - Y2 - Comanda ON/OFF in Mod Operare Manual
P384-Apa - Y3 - Comanda ON/OFF in Mod Operare Manual
P385 - Reset Oprire de Urgenta - Zona 1
P386 - Reset Oprire de Urgenta - Zona 2
P387 - Reset Oprire de Urgenta - Zona 3
P388 - Reset Oprire de Urgenta - Zona 4
P389 - Reset Oprire de Urgenta - Zona 5
P390 - Reset Oprire de Urgenta - Zona 6
P391 - Reset Oprire de Urgenta - Zona 7
P392 - Reset Oprire de Urgenta - Zona 8
P397-T7AB - Masina Marcare - Cmd. Start Marcare (local)
P405-Apa - Selectat Start pompe joasa presiune
P406-Apa - Selectat Stop pompa joasa presiune
P407-Apa - Selectat Start pompa inalta presiune
P408-Apa - Selectat Stop pompa inalta presiune
P414-Apa - Selectie unitate 200 bar pentru Destunderizator_PSC
